pages.text: $(bold)Cart Assembler$() — place it on rails, glue a structure to a minecart beneath, and power it: the build rides the minecart as a mobile contraption. Mobile farms, drilling trains, and roving bases all start here.$(br2)Stop the cart on another assembler to disassemble it back into blocks.
pages.title: Minecart Contraptions

pages.text: $(bold)Two Novus add-ons help here:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Create Contraption Terminals$() — lets Tom's Storage terminals reach inventories on a moving contraption.$(li)$(bold)Create: Power Loader$() — mechanical chunk-loaders so your trains, mining rigs, and far-off farms keep running while you're away.
pages.title: Contraption Add-ons
